body_transformation: Pikachu's rounded head now features smooth, scale-covered skin in deep ocean blue with subtle teal patterns along the cheek patches, replacing the dark brown. The curled tail tip extends into a streamlined, fin-like tail with a pearly white edge, while the pale cream underbelly shifts to a soft seafoam green. Webbed feet with delicate fin-like extensions replace the stubby legs, maintaining the quadruped stance. The pointed ears are transformed into small, streamlined fins with a faint aquamarine glow along their edges.
signature_feature: Tail fin: pearly white fin with seafoam green edging and aquamarine glow.
